channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising inflation and fuel prices put strain on South African households
item.description: South Africans are feeling the pinch as inflation jumped to 4% in April, up from 3.1% in March, bringing it to the midpoint of the South African Reserve Bank's 3%–6% target range. Economists warn that...

item.title: Jeff Bezos comments on Amazon's investment in Melania Trump documentary despite poor reviews
item.description: Jeff Bezos has addressed criticism regarding Amazon's backing of the documentary film 'Melania,' which has been widely panned by critics. Despite the movie achieving a mere 10% score on Rotten Tomatoe...

item.title: White House Prepares AI Executive Order as Google Unveils New AI Products at I/O Conference
item.description: The White House is set to release a highly anticipated executive order on artificial intelligence as soon as tomorrow, according to sources. The order is expected to outline key policy directions on A...

item.title: South Australia to feature in the Michelin Guide, boosting local food and tourism
item.description: South Australia is set to become the first Australian region included in the prestigious Michelin Guide, with the inaugural selection announced in October. Originally founded in France in 1900 to prom...

item.title: Travis Barker Documentary ‘Louder Than Fear’ Set for Tribeca Premiere and Global Release
item.description: Travis Barker, the renowned drummer of Blink-182, is the focus of a new documentary titled 'Louder Than Fear', which delves into his life, career, and personal struggles. The 90-minute film is set to ...

item.title: Rivers State Governor Fubara Steps Down From APC Governorship Race
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Siminalayi Fubara, don announce say e don withdraw from the All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship primary election for Rivers State. For one statement wey he personally s...

item.title: Trump's Efforts to Punish Republican Lawmakers May Backfire on the GOP
item.description: President Donald Trump's recent focus on targeting Republican lawmakers he perceives as disloyal, including Sen. Bill Cassidy and Rep. Thomas Massie, could create long-term challenges for his party, a...

item.title: Delhi High Court dismisses petition seeking deregistration of AAP and disqualification of its leaders
item.description: On 20th May 2026, the Delhi High Court dismissed a Public Interest Litigation (PIL) that sought to direct the Election Commission of India to deregister the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) and disqualify its ch...

item.title: PM Modi Awarded FAO’s Agricola Medal for Initiatives Supporting Farmers and Food Security
item.description: On 21st May 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi was awarded the Agricola Medal, the highest accolade by the Food and Agriculture Organisation (FAO), recognising his government’s efforts in enhancing ag...

item.title: Trump Endorses Ken Paxton, Leaving Senator John Cornyn Politically Vulnerable
item.description: Former GOP strategist Stuart Stevens expressed deep concern over U.S. Senator John Cornyn's political situation following a surprising endorsement of Cornyn's primary opponent, Texas Attorney General ...

item.title: Iran accuses US of escalating tensions following Trump statement
item.description: Iran has publicly accused the United States of seeking to provoke a new conflict in the Middle East after former US President Donald Trump made recent threatening remarks. Iranian officials, including...

item.title: Ontario Tests Resident for Ebola After Travel to East Africa Amid Outbreak
item.description: Ontario health authorities are testing one resident for Ebola as a precaution following their recent travel to East Africa. The individual is being screened for multiple infectious diseases, including...

item.title: Mercedes-AMG GT 4-Door Coupé: All-Electric Performance with Up to 860kW
item.description: Mercedes-AMG has unveiled its fully electric GT 4-Door Coupé, aiming to compete with high-performance EVs like the Porsche Taycan. The traditional V8 engine has been replaced with a triple axial flux ...

item.title: Governor Diri Applauds APC Members for Peaceful and United Primaries in Bayelsa
item.description: For Bayelsa State, Governor Senator Douye Diri don give props to the APC for showing serious unity and togetherness during their House of Representatives primaries. The exercise happen for Sampou/Kala...

item.title: Jan. 6 Officers Sue to Block Trump Administration's $1.8 Billion Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: Two police officers injured during the January 6, 2021, attack on the U.S. Capitol filed a lawsuit on May 20, 2026, against the Justice Department seeking to dissolve the newly created $1.8 billion An...

item.title: LTFRB Streamlines Franchise Renewal Process for Public Utility Vehicles
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has announced a streamlined process for renewing Certificates of Public Convenience (CPC) for public utility vehicles (PUVs), eliminati...

item.title: Trump Signals Potential Challenge to Rep. Lauren Boebert After Epstein Files Dispute
item.description: President Donald Trump has indicated that he might support a primary challenger against Republican Representative Lauren Boebert of Colorado after she broke ranks with him and allied with Representati...

item.title: Nairobi Police Detain Suspect in Rachel Wandeto Killing
item.description: Nairobi police have arrested a taxi driver, Josiah Runjiri, suspected to be behind the brutal killing of gospel musician Rachel Wandeto. The incident happened after Wandeto was doused in petrol and se...

item.title: Adamson edges UP to secure final UAAP baseball semifinals berth
item.description: In a tense and action-packed conclusion to the UAAP Season 87 baseball elimination round, Adamson University managed to narrowly defeat the University of the Philippines (UP) to claim the last spot in...

item.title: Foo Fighters Share Humorous Stories and Embarrassing Lyrics on Hot Ones Versus
item.description: Foo Fighters recently appeared on the spin-off interview series Hot Ones Versus, where the band members faced both spicy wings and challenging questions. The group discussed a variety of personal anec...
